testcase.name: registerUser_Logout

failure.message: com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonParseException: Unexpected character (']' (code 93)): expected a valid value (JSON String, Number, Array, Object or token 'null', 'true' or 'false') at [Source: (StringReader); line: 53, column: 2]
